log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Lizardfolk — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 16
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Lizardfolk — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Lizardfolk — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 16] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 16] HIT! 17 damage. Lizardfolk — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 16] HIT! 14 damage. Lizardfolk — Bardic Musician HP: 36/67
--- Lizardfolk — Bardic Musician --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 16
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
